      • createMoveOrder(fleetId: FleetId; targetSystem: SystemId; priority: int = 0): FleetOrder

      • newOrderPacket(houseId: HouseId; turn: int): OrderPacket

      • validateFleetOrder(order: FleetOrder; state: GameState): ValidationResult
        validateOrderPacket
      • validateOrderPacket(packet: OrderPacket; state: GameState): ValidationResult

Fleet order types and validation for EC4X

Imports

../common/hex, ../common/types/core, ../common/types/units, gamestate, fleet, ship, spacelift, espionage/types, research/types

Types

BuildOrder = object
  colonySystem*: SystemId
  buildType*: BuildType
  quantity*: int
  shipClass*: Option[ShipClass]
  buildingType*: Option[string]
  industrialUnits*: int
BuildType {.pure.} = enum
  Ship, Building, Infrastructure
CargoManagementAction {.pure.} = enum
  LoadCargo, UnloadCargo
Cargo loading/unloading actions at colonies 
CargoManagementOrder = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  colonySystem*: SystemId
  action*: CargoManagementAction
  fleetId*: FleetId
  cargoType*: Option[CargoType]
  quantity*: Option[int]
Order to load/unload cargo on spacelift ships at colonies 
DiplomaticAction = object
  targetHouse*: HouseId
  actionType*: DiplomaticActionType
DiplomaticActionType {.pure.} = enum
  ProposeNonAggressionPact, BreakPact, DeclareEnemy, SetNeutral
Diplomatic actions per diplomacy.md:8.1 
FleetOrder = object
  fleetId*: FleetId
  orderType*: FleetOrderType
  targetSystem*: Option[SystemId]
  targetFleet*: Option[FleetId]
  priority*: int
FleetOrderType {.pure.} = enum
  Hold, Move, SeekHome, Patrol, GuardStarbase, GuardPlanet, BlockadePlanet,
  Bombard, Invade, Blitz, Colonize, SpyPlanet, SpySystem, HackStarbase,
  JoinFleet, Rendezvous, Salvage
OrderPacket = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  turn*: int
  fleetOrders*: seq[FleetOrder]
  buildOrders*: seq[BuildOrder]
  researchAllocation*: res_types.ResearchAllocation
  diplomaticActions*: seq[DiplomaticAction]
  populationTransfers*: seq[PopulationTransferOrder]
  squadronManagement*: seq[SquadronManagementOrder]
  cargoManagement*: seq[CargoManagementOrder]
  espionageAction*: Option[EspionageAttempt]
  ebpInvestment*: int
  cipInvestment*: int
PopulationTransferOrder = object
  sourceColony*: SystemId
  destColony*: SystemId
  ptuAmount*: int
Space Guild population transfer between colonies Source: economy.md:3.7, config/population.toml 
SquadronManagementAction {.pure.} = enum
  TransferShip, AssignToFleet
Squadron and ship management actions at colonies 
SquadronManagementOrder = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  colonySystem*: SystemId
  action*: SquadronManagementAction
  shipIndices*: seq[int]
  newSquadronId*: Option[string]
  sourceSquadronId*: Option[string]
  targetSquadronId*: Option[string]
  shipIndex*: Option[int]
  squadronId*: Option[string]
  targetFleetId*: Option[FleetId]
Order to form squadrons, transfer ships, or assign to fleets at colonies 
ValidationResult = object
  valid*: bool
  error*: string

Procs

proc addBuildOrder(packet: var OrderPacket; order: BuildOrder) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add a build order to packet 
proc addFleetOrder(packet: var OrderPacket; order: FleetOrder) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add a fleet order to packet 
proc createAttackOrder(fleetId: FleetId; targetSystem: SystemId;
                       attackType: FleetOrderType; priority: int = 0): FleetOrder {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create an attack order (bombard, invade, or blitz) 
proc createColonizeOrder(fleetId: FleetId; targetSystem: SystemId;
                         priority: int = 0): FleetOrder {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create a colonization order 
proc createHoldOrder(fleetId: FleetId; priority: int = 0): FleetOrder {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a hold position order 
proc createMoveOrder(fleetId: FleetId; targetSystem: SystemId; priority: int = 0): FleetOrder {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a movement order 
proc newOrderPacket(houseId: HouseId; turn: int): OrderPacket {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create empty order packet for a house 
proc validateFleetOrder(order: FleetOrder; state: GameState): ValidationResult {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Validate a fleet order against current game state 
proc validateOrderPacket(packet: OrderPacket; state: GameState): ValidationResult {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Validate entire order packet for a house

Made with Nim. Generated: 1980-01-01 00:00:00 UTC
